Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion To Deem Christopher Watkins A Vexatious Litigant And To Compel Arbitration.

The court grants defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and denies its motion to deem plaintiff Christopher Watkins a vexatious litigant.

(see word minutes for complete details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312

Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Continued To Jan-03-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Michelle Lee, Esq. of Shook Hardy & Bacon LLP, Tel. 415.544.1900, appearing for Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion And Notice Of Judgement On The Pleadings As To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint.

This matter was contested. Ms. Lee appears to inform the Court that courtesy copies were delivered to the department this morning and to request a continuance to allow time for the Court to hear the motion.

At the request of Ms. Lee, the Court's tentative ruling is vacated and the matter is continued to January 3, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302. Ms. Lee is to provide notice of the continuance to the other side.
